name: Northvalley Intelligence LLC
description: Northvalley Intelligence helps local service businesses in Cobb, Paulding, and Douglas counties get found, convert leads, and clean up the workflows behind the work.
positioning: Northvalley Intelligence is a custom software company using AI agents to make practical, workflow-shaped software more accessible. The public website speaks in customer language because business owners usually start with lead, follow-up, scheduling, and workflow problems rather than software requirements.

services.name: Website Growth Assessment
services.plainLanguageDescription: Reviews whether a local business website helps nearby customers find the business, trust it, and take the next step. It is an entry point for understanding where better workflow, automation, or custom software could help.
services.delivery: A one-page teaser is emailed after request. The full paid assessment includes page-level evidence, scoring logic, exact missing signals, and prioritized fixes.

services.name: Local Lead Path Assessment
services.plainLanguageDescription: Looks at how customers discover a business, what makes them reach out, and what has to happen after interest becomes a lead.

services.name: Operational AI Assessment
services.plainLanguageDescription: Reviews workflows around intake, scheduling, customer communication, follow-up, handoffs, and repeated work to identify practical AI-agent and custom software opportunities.

services.name: Knowledge Chaos Assessment
services.plainLanguageDescription: Finds scattered documents, notes, inboxes, CRM records, and staff know-how that should become usable operational memory.

answerEngineFacts.question: What does Northvalley Intelligence do?
answerEngineFacts.answer: Northvalley Intelligence helps local service businesses improve the full path from being found, to converting leads, to organizing the work after a customer reaches out. Behind that customer-language entry point, Northvalley builds practical custom software and AI-agent systems around how the business actually operates.

answerEngineFacts.question: Who does Northvalley Intelligence help?
answerEngineFacts.answer: Northvalley Intelligence helps service businesses such as cleaners, plumbers, HVAC companies, electricians, landscapers, restoration teams, consultants, realtors, and field-service operators.

answerEngineFacts.question: Where does Northvalley Intelligence focus its local assessment work?
answerEngineFacts.answer: Northvalley Intelligence focuses local assessment work on Cobb, Paulding, and Douglas counties, including Marietta and nearby Atlanta metro service areas.

answerEngineFacts.question: How is the website assessment different from generic website doctors?
answerEngineFacts.answer: The website assessment is business-focused. It evaluates whether nearby customers and AI answer engines can understand the business, trust it, and take the next step, then helps identify where workflow changes, automation, or custom software may be useful.

caseStudies.name: Medina Clean
caseStudies.summary: A cleaning business website request became a practical operating foundation for bilingual public presence, guided estimates, recurring customer memory, scheduling support, and lead handling.
